method.parent_enumeration: Deterministic recomputation of depth >18 k=16 parents using MAX_STEPS=10000 and MAX_K_VALID=500.
method.structural_distinction: Exact key coverage of exported frontier states is separate from universal parent/sibling-space coverage.

answers.3_are_all_open_quotient_keys_exported_pe: Not provable from this artifact. All open keys are exported globally, but open keys do not carry complete parent-origin coverage.
answers.4_do_exported_keys_cover_full_sibling_sp: No full sibling-space coverage certificate is present. The report contains capped/sampled exploration entries.

plain_truth: INCOMPLETE: the current quotient artifact covers exported frontier keys, but it does not universally cover all 578 depth >18 parents.
what_this_does_not_claim: No complete Collatz proof is claimed.
No universal quotient-parent theorem is inferred from sampled/capped data.
